character_buff.description: Serena maintains and modifies her firearm.

effects: Duration: 400 seconds
[Modification - Firepower], [Modification - Rapid Fire] Shared
Attack Rating +1
Attack +50%
Physical Penetration +25
Accuracy +25
[Modification - Firepower] Physical Penetration +10
[Modification - Rapid Fire] Attack Speed +30%, Casting Time -10%
Switches to a different trigger each time the skill is used

skills.name: Pointaje
skills.description: Fires a rapid burst of shots at the target.
skills.target: Max Range 16m / Radius 3m / Up to 4 enemies around the designated target

effects: Skill damage doubled against monsters whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
Switches to [Modification - Firepower] state whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
Can cast [P Attaju] can be cast additionally
When casting an additional skill, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 2 seconds
Skill damage doubled against monsters whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
Switches to [Modification - Firepower] state whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
Can cast [P Attaju] can be cast additionally
When casting an additional skill, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 2 seconds

skills.name: Tier de Sutian
skills.description: Throws and fires explosives to control the surrounding area.

effects: 20% chance to apply [Flame] to the enemy on hit
Skill damage doubled when in [Souvenir Leve] state (1.5x against PCs)
When in [Modification - Firepower] state, 3x skill damage
When in [Modification - Firepower] state, switches to [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
20% chance to apply [Flame] to the enemy on hit
Skill damage doubled when in [Souvenir Leve] state (1.5x against PCs)
When in [Modification - Firepower] state, 3x skill damage
When in [Modification - Firepower] state, switches to [Modification - Rapid Fire] state

skills.name: Tiraiaju
skills.description: Fires a barrage at the target, followed by a powerful single shot.

effects: 40% chance to inflict [Critical Wound] on the enemy upon hit
Skill damage doubled whilst in [Souvenir Leve] state (1.5x for PCs)
Skill damage tripled against monsters whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
Switches to [Modification - Firepower] status whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] status
Ignores an additional (Total [Skill] * 0.04)% of the monsters defence
40% chance to inflict [Critical Wound] on the enemy upon hit
Skill damage doubled whilst in [Souvenir Leve] state (1.5x for PCs)
Skill damage tripled against monsters whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] state
Switches to [Modification - Firepower] status whilst in [Modification - Rapid Fire] status
Ignores an additional (Total [Skill] * 0.04)% of the monsters defence

skills.name: Pou Converge
skills.description: Devastates the area ahead using a special shell.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a 20m x 6m area in front

effects: On hit, 50% chance to [Impact] the enemy
Skill damage to monsters up to 2x as the number of targets hit decreases
Skill damage to monsters 4x while in [Modification - Firepower] state
Switches to [Modification - Rapid Fire] state while in [Modification - Firepower] state
Ignores additional defense of monsters equal to (Total [Skill] * 0.04)%
On hit, 50% chance to [Impact] the enemy
Skill damage to monsters up to 2x as the number of targets hit decreases
Skill damage to monsters 4x while in [Modification - Firepower] state
Switches to [Modification - Rapid Fire] state while in [Modification - Firepower] state
Ignores additional defense of monsters equal to (Total [Skill] * 0.04)%
